languages.original_text: "Fangs of Morkai, the xenos will answer for their perfidy! The prisoner was not my brother by blood, but he died a faithful son of the Allfather. The iron dead will pay a wergeld for his death."

languages.text: "Клыки Моркаи, ксеносы ответят за свое коварство! Пленник не был мне братом по крови, но он погиб верным сыном Всеотца. Железные мертвецы сполна заплатят виру за его смерть".
"Fangs of Morkai, the xenos will answer for their perfidy! The prisoner was not my brother by blood, but he died a faithful son of the Allfather. The iron dead will pay a wergeld for his death."
languages.original_text: "Клыки Моркаи, ксеносы ответят за свое коварство! Пленник не был мне братом по крови, но он погиб верным сыном Всеотца. Железные мертвецы сполна заплатят виру за его смерть".

traits.locale_text: "Fangs of Morkai, the xenos will answer for their perfidy! The prisoner was not my brother by blood, but he died a faithful son of the Allfather. The iron dead will pay a wergeld for his death."
"Fangs of Morkai, the xenos will answer for their perfidy! The prisoner was not my brother by blood, but he died a faithful son of the Allfather. The iron dead will pay a wergeld for his death."
"Fangs of Morkai, the xenos will answer for their perfidy! The prisoner was not my brother by blood, but he died a faithful son of the Allfather. The iron dead will pay a wergeld for his death."

languages.text: 「モルクアイの牙、異種族は裏切りを償う！捕虜は血の兄弟ではなかったが、彼はオールファザーの忠実な息子として死んだ。鉄の死者は彼の死の償いを払う」
languages.original_text: "Fangs of Morkai, the xenos will answer for their perfidy! The prisoner was not my brother by blood, but he died a faithful son of the Allfather. The iron dead will pay a wergeld for his death."

traits.locale_text: 「モルクアイの牙、異種族は裏切りを償う！捕虜は血の兄弟ではなかったが、彼はオールファザーの忠実な息子として死んだ。鉄の死者は彼の死の償いを払う。」

languages.text: « Par les crocs de Morkaï, les xénos répondront de leur perfidie ! Le prisonnier n'était pas mon frère de sang, mais il a péri avec la dignité d'un fidèle fils du Père de Tous. Les morts de fer paieront très cher pour l'avoir tué. »
languages.original_text: "Fangs of Morkai, the xenos will answer for their perfidy! The prisoner was not my brother by blood, but he died a faithful son of the Allfather. The iron dead will pay a wergeld for his death."

traits.locale_text: « Par les crocs de Morkaï, les xénos répondront de leur perfidie ! Le prisonnier n'était pas mon frère de sang, mais il a péri avec la dignité d'un fidèle fils du Père de Tous. Les morts de fer paieront très cher pour l'avoir tué. »

languages.text: "Bei den Fängen von Morkai, die Xenos werden für ihre Niedertracht bezahlen! Der Gefangene war nicht mein Blutsverwandter, aber er starb als treuer Sohn des Allvaters. Die Eisentoten werden ein Wergeld für seinen Tod bezahlen."
languages.original_text: "Fangs of Morkai, the xenos will answer for their perfidy! The prisoner was not my brother by blood, but he died a faithful son of the Allfather. The iron dead will pay a wergeld for his death."

traits.locale_text: "Bei den Fängen von Morkai, die Xenos werden für ihre Niedertracht bezahlen! Der Gefangene war nicht mein Blutsverwandter, aber er starb als treuer Sohn des Allvaters. Die Eisentoten werden ein Wergeld für seinen Tod bezahlen."

languages.text: "Morkai'ın Dişleri! Zenolar ihanetlerinin hesabını verecek! Mahkûm benim kan kardeşim olmasa da Yücebaba'nın sadık bir evladı olarak öldü. Demir ölüler onun ölümünün diyetini ödeyecek."
languages.original_text: "Fangs of Morkai, the xenos will answer for their perfidy! The prisoner was not my brother by blood, but he died a faithful son of the Allfather. The iron dead will pay a wergeld for his death."

traits.locale_text: "Morkai'ın Dişleri! Zenolar ihanetlerinin hesabını verecek! Mahkûm benim kan kardeşim olmasa da Yücebaba'nın sadık bir evladı olarak öldü. Demir ölüler onun ölümünün diyetini ödeyecek."

languages.text: «¡Por los colmillos de Morkai, esos xenos responderán por su perfidia! El prisionero no solo era mi hermano de sangre, sino que murió como un hijo fiel del Padre de todas las cosas. Los muertos férreos pagarán con creces su muerte».
languages.original_text: "Fangs of Morkai, the xenos will answer for their perfidy! The prisoner was not my brother by blood, but he died a faithful son of the Allfather. The iron dead will pay a wergeld for his death."

traits.locale_text: «¡Por los colmillos de Morkai, esos xenos responderán por su perfidia! El prisionero no solo era mi hermano de sangre, sino que murió como un hijo fiel del Padre de todas las cosas. Los muertos férreos pagarán con creces su muerte».

languages.text: “莫凯之牙在上，异形必将为其背信弃义付出代价！那囚犯虽非我的血亲兄弟，却是为全父而死的忠贞之子。那些铁块死人定要为他的死血债血偿！”
languages.original_text: "Fangs of Morkai, the xenos will answer for their perfidy! The prisoner was not my brother by blood, but he died a faithful son of the Allfather. The iron dead will pay a wergeld for his death."

traits.locale_text: “莫凯之牙在上，异形必将为其背信弃义付出代价！那囚犯虽非我的血亲兄弟，却是为全父而死的忠贞之子。那些铁块死人定要为他的死血债血偿！”
